requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 220 V / 50 Hz Supply, Type C/F Plug (EOS/ES Standards)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——220V/50Hz供电，C/F型插头（EOS/ES标准）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——220V/50Hz供電，C/F型插頭（EOS/ES標準）

summary.en: Egypt uses 220 V / 50 Hz AC supply with Type C and Type F (Schuko) plugs. Mains-powered wireless devices must conform to EOS/ES electrical safety standards aligned with IEC 62368-1 (audio/video and IT equipment safety, current generation) or IEC 60950-1 (legacy). EOS/ES standards are administered by EOS under MOQSS. Electrical safety test reports from an accredited laboratory are required as part of the NTRA type approval dossier. Products must be fitted with Type C or F plugs for the Egyptian market.
summary.zh: 埃及使用220V/50Hz交流电，采用C型和F型（Schuko）插头。带有市电电源的无线设备须符合EOS/ES电气安全标准，该标准与IEC 62368-1（音视频及信息技术设备安全，现行版）或IEC 60950-1（旧版）保持一致。EOS/ES标准由MOQSS下属EOS管理。来自认可实验室的电气安全测试报告须作为NTRA型式核准文件的组成部分提交。面向埃及市场的产品须配备C型或F型插头。
summary.zht: 埃及使用220V/50Hz交流電，採用C型和F型（Schuko）插頭。帶有市電電源的無線裝置須符合EOS/ES電氣安全標準，該標準與IEC 62368-1（音視頻及資訊技術設備安全，現行版）或IEC 60950-1（舊版）保持一致。EOS/ES標準由MOQSS下屬EOS管理。來自認可實驗室的電氣安全測試報告須作為NTRA型式核准文件的組成部分提交。面向埃及市場的產品須配備C型或F型插頭。

standards_or_laws: EOS/ES standards aligned with IEC 62368-1:2018 (Audio/Video and IT equipment safety — current generation)
EOS/ES standards aligned with IEC 60950-1:2005+A2:2013 (legacy IT equipment safety)
Egypt mains supply: 220 V / 50 Hz, Type C and Type F (Schuko) plug (IEC 60083)
NTRA type approval dossier: electrical safety test report requirement

summary.en: China requires CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for mains-powered IT and audio/video equipment under GB 4943.1 (aligned with IEC 60950-1) or GB/T 33012 (aligned with IEC 62368-1). China mains supply is 220 V / 50 Hz, Type I plug (flat two-pin or three-pin, GB 2099.1). Mains voltage is compatible with Egypt but plug type differs. CCC is not recognised by Egypt EOS or NTRA.
summary.zh: 中国要求市电供电的IT及音视频设备取得CCC认证，依据GB 4943.1（对应IEC 60950-1）或GB/T 33012（对应IEC 62368-1）。中国市电为220V/50Hz，采用I型插头（扁平两脚或三脚，GB 2099.1）。市电电压与埃及兼容，但插头类型不同。CCC不被埃及EOS或NTRA认可。
summary.zht: 中國要求市電供電的IT及音視頻設備取得CCC認證，依據GB 4943.1（對應IEC 60950-1）或GB/T 33012（對應IEC 62368-1）。中國市電為220V/50Hz，採用I型插頭（扁平兩腳或三腳，GB 2099.1）。市電電壓與埃及相容，但插頭類型不同。CCC不被埃及EOS或NTRA認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 (IT equipment safety, aligned with IEC 60950-1) — CCC mandatory for in-scope products
GB/T 33012 (aligned with IEC 62368-1) — CCC mandatory for in-scope products
China mains supply: 220 V / 50 Hz, Type I plug (GB 2099.1)

gap.en: CCC electrical safety certification is not recognised in Egypt. IEC 62368-1 (or IEC 60950-1) test reports to EOS/ES standards from an accredited laboratory are required for the NTRA type approval dossier. Plug type must be changed from Chinese Type I to European Type C/F for market-ready product. Mains voltage (220 V / 50 Hz) is compatible so no power conversion is needed.
gap.zh: CCC电气安全认证在埃及不被认可。须提供来自认可实验室的符合EOS/ES标准的IEC 62368-1（或IEC 60950-1）测试报告，作为NTRA型式核准文件的组成部分。面向市场的产品须将插头类型由中国I型更换为欧洲C/F型。市电电压（220V/50Hz）兼容，无需电源转换。
gap.zht: CCC電氣安全認證在埃及不被認可。須提供來自認可實驗室的符合EOS/ES標準的IEC 62368-1（或IEC 60950-1）測試報告，作為NTRA型式核准文件的組成部分。面向市場的產品須將插頭類型由中國I型更換為歐洲C/F型。市電電壓（220V/50Hz）相容，無需電源轉換。

source.publisher: EOS — Egyptian Organization for Standards and Quality (MOQSS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese CCC electrical safety certification is not recognised in Egypt. IEC 62368-1 / EOS/ES compliant safety test reports from an accredited laboratory are required for the NTRA type approval dossier. Products must be fitted with Type C or Type F plugs for the Egyptian market; mains voltage (220 V / 50 Hz) is compatible.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国CCC电气安全认证在埃及不被承认。须提供来自认可实验室的符合IEC 62368-1 / EOS/ES的安全测试报告，作为NTRA型式核准文件的组成部分。面向埃及市场的产品须配备C型或F型插头；市电电压（220V/50Hz）兼容。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國CCC電氣安全認證在埃及不被承認。須提供來自認可實驗室的符合IEC 62368-1 / EOS/ES的安全測試報告，作為NTRA型式核准文件的組成部分。面向埃及市場的產品須配備C型或F型插頭；市電電壓（220V/50Hz）相容。
